title: 3D/UI expansion pack partially delivered
affects: future 3D massing / premium UI / financial / opportunity workstreams
detail: At 2026-07-14 21:30-21:31 UTC three expansion files appeared in the working tree (CONTINUE_FROM_CURRENT_STATE_PROMPT.md, docs/3D_MASSING_ENGINE_ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/PREMIUM_PRODUCT_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md) and were committed (9aff29a) after a secrets scan. The continuation prompt references 4 more documents (.claude/rules/3d-ui-expansion.md, docs/COMPETITIVE_FEATURE_EXPANSION.md, docs/3D_AND_UI_EXECUTION_PLAN.md, docs/3D_VISUAL_ACCEPTANCE_STANDARD.md) and 5 new subagents (3d-massing-engineer, product-design-director, visual-quality-reviewer, financial-feasibility-engineer, opportunity-search-engineer) that do NOT exist in the repository.
exact_human_action: Finish copying the complete 3D/UI expansion pack into the project root (the 4 missing docs and the 5 new .claude/agents/*.md files), or confirm the pack should be considered withdrawn.
how_it_will_be_tested: Presence check of the 9 missing files; then M0-T010 integration report proceeds automatically.

audit_log.result: STILL OPEN — re-audited after quarantining the unknown generic .claude pack. Presence check: 3 of 12 pack files present (CONTINUE_FROM_CURRENT_STATE_PROMPT.md, docs/3D_MASSING_ENGINE_ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/PREMIUM_PRODUCT_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md); all 4 remaining docs and all 5 subagent files MISSING. No INTEGRATION_MANIFEST.json exists anywhere in the repository, the quarantined pack, or any file reference (case-insensitive grep: zero matches) — the authoritative expected-file list is the continuation prompt lines 13-18 plus its 5 named subagents. Confirmed: the quarantined generic Node/Express pack contains NONE of the expansion files; quarantine did not remove any expansion content. B-005 remains open; owner must supply the 9 files or declare the pack withdrawn.

OWNER DECISION RECORDED (directive 2026-07-16): GDS does NOT supersede the pack — the original 3D/UI expansion pack remains REQUIRED (its financial-feasibility, opportunity-search, 3D, design, and visual-review materials complement GDS). Owner directed locating nyc-buildability-3d-ui-expansion-pack.zip and integrating additively per its real INTEGRATION_MANIFEST.json with per-file verification. LOCATE ATTEMPT FAILED: searched (1) Downloads/Desktop/Documents/OneDrive by patterns *expansion*pack*, *buildability*, *3d-ui*, *3d_ui*, *expansion-pack*, *expansion_pack*, plus full .zip inventory of Downloads; (2) recursive C:\Users\MLFLL sweep for nyc-buildability-3d-ui-expansion-pack*, *3d-ui-expansion*, INTEGRATION_MANIFEST.json (zero matches outside the repo's own blocker/handoff references); (3) C:\ root; C: is the only filesystem drive. The zip and its manifest are NOT on this machine. B-005 remains open per owner instruction (open until the complete manifest is verified). EXACT HUMAN ACTION: owner must place nyc-buildability-3d-ui-expansion-pack.zip (containing INTEGRATION_MANIFEST.json) anywhere on this PC (Downloads suggested) or state where to obtain it; integration will then proceed additively with per-manifest-entry verification and collision diffing.
